lines.speaker: Reinald
lines.text: Welcome to my home. Is there anything you wanted?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing in particular. Got any sightseeing tips?

lines.speaker: Reinald
lines.text: No, I'm just a factory worker. Don't do tours.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: This doesn't look like a factory.

lines.speaker: Reinald
lines.text: This is my home. I'm off-duty.
